archimate:Representation.name: Linked Open Data
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Definition: Linked Open Data ABB is a Representation that enables the procedures of publishing structured data enriched with metadata to ensure data understanding, connection, findability and link with informational resources.
Source: EUROPEANA PRO
Source reference: https://pro.europeana.eu/page/linked-open-data
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): EuropeanaPro https://pro.europeana.eu/page/linked-open-data
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Semantic view
Interoperability Saliency: The Linked Open Data Representation ABB is salient for semantic interoperability because it provides a set of publishing, sharing, and connection methods that allow linking and publishing the data from digital public services, making it more meaningful and increasing the quality and scope of data and services. Moreover, it increases data discoverability and maximises the reuse and exchange of data.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/LinkedOpenDataRepresentation
ABB name: eira:LinkedOpenDataRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/LinkedOpenDataRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic

properties.value: Linked Open Data ABB is a Representation that enables the procedures of publishing structured data enriched with metadata to ensure data understanding, connection, findability and link with informational resources.

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): EuropeanaPro https://pro.europeana.eu/page/linked-open-data

The Linked Open Data Representation ABB is salient for semantic interoperability because it provides a set of publishing, sharing, and connection methods that allow linking and publishing the data from digital public services, making it more meaningful and increasing the quality and scope of data and services. Moreover, it increases data discoverability and maximises the reuse and exchange of data.
